steps.title: Set up the equation
steps.content:
We have $f(x) = 8\sqrt{x}$ and we need $f(x) = 48$. Substitute 48 for $f(x)$:
$$8\sqrt{x} = 48$$

steps.title: Isolate the radical and square both sides
steps.content:
Divide both sides by 8:
$$\sqrt{x} = 6$$

Square both sides to eliminate the radical:
$$x = 36$$

That matches choice C — C is correct.
